files.keys_format: TripleKey[row_count] where TripleKey={uint32_t a, uint32_t b, uint32_t c}

storage_extensions.usage: mmap offsets.bin and keys.bin; compute partition = hash_triple(adsh, tag, version) >> 45, then linearly scan keys[offsets[partition] .. offsets[partition + 1]) for an exact anti-join existence check instead of probing pre_adsh_tag_version_groups.hash.bin

join_order.probe: num(filtered: ddate range, uom=USD, value IS NOT NULL)
join_order.notes: Use the new exact partitioned-membership index over pre triples: 524288 hash partitions over 8631890 unique keys, so each probe touches a 4.1 MB offsets directory plus a tiny contiguous key slice (avg 16.5 triples, max 37) instead of random-walking the 33554432-bucket open-addressed hash table.

scan.access_pattern: postings-driven candidate enumeration with random gathers into num columns; anti-join probe becomes one hash computation, one directory lookup, and a short contiguous exact-key scan

data_structures.dim_filter: bitset(39401761) for num_uom_postings membership; drive from num_ddate_postings range rowids
data_structures.fact_join: pre_built_index(hash_partitioned_exact_triples_p19) using uint64_t partition offsets plus contiguous TripleKey slices

indexes.purpose: enumerate 2023 candidate rowids via postings range scan
apply USD membership before anti-join probes
exact anti-join existence lookup on (adsh, tag, version) with cache-friendly partitioned slices

optimization_notes: Root cause: the anti-join probes a 33554432-bucket open-addressed pre hash table whose 24-byte buckets occupy about 805 MB, far beyond the 88 MB LLC, so roughly 9.0M filtered num candidates pay random cache-miss latency in the hot path. Strategy category E: build and use a new exact partitioned-membership storage extension from the persisted unique pre triples, with 524288 hash partitions, a 4.1 MB offsets directory, and contiguous per-partition key slices averaging 16.5 triples (max 37). The revised plan keeps the postings-driven num filtering and direct (tag,version) aggregation, but replaces each cache-thrashing anti-probe with a directory lookup plus a tiny sequential exact-key scan.
